# Beauty Business OS

> AI-powered business operating system for beauty professionals. Talk to it. It runs your business.

## What This Is

A Claude Code project that acts as an AI business partner for beauty professionals. Users say "set me up," answer 10-15 questions about their business, and get a fully configured system that handles content creation, marketing, client follow-ups, scheduling, revenue tracking, and reporting — all through conversation.

## Key Files

- `CLAUDE.md` — Master AI instructions. Governs all behavior, setup wizard, and agent routing.
- `CLIENT_CONFIG.md` — Per-user business profile. Populated during setup.
- `agents/` — Four specialized agents: COO (operations), Content Creator (social/email/blog), GHL Assistant (CRM), Image Generator (graphics).
- `config/niche-presets/` — Industry knowledge for 11 beauty niches.
- `config/voice-presets/` — Brand personality options (5 presets).
- `dashboard/index.html` — Visual business dashboard (single-file HTML, localStorage).
- `playbooks/` — Strategy playbooks for organic marketing, auto-posting, client ops.
- `funnels/` — Client-facing sales funnels (booking, lead capture, referral).
- `templates/` — Content and business templates.
- `heartbeats/` — Scheduled AI check-in templates.

## How It Works

The user opens this folder in Claude Code and talks to it. Claude reads CLAUDE.md for instructions, CLIENT_CONFIG.md for business context, selects the appropriate agent, applies the niche preset and voice preset, and generates responses/content/actions specific to that beauty professional's business.

## Not a Code Repo

This is a product repo — primarily markdown files, JSON presets, and one HTML dashboard. There is no backend server, no API, no build step. The "runtime" is Claude Code itself.
